MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Paul Lynn.
Attorney Jonathan Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Janet Redmond is present.
Attorney Laura Slade Chiera representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per Judge Pro Tem. The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
